title: Lenient Creepers
description: Makes creepers not destroy already dropped items.
body:
### Functionality
With this mod installed, dropped items will not disappear when a Creeper blows them up. There is a single configuration option (onlyWithMobGriefingGamerule), which defines whether the gamerule *mobGriefing* affects the mod's behavior or not, and is set to *true* by default.\
If the config option is set to true, items hit with a Creeper explosion will only get spared if *mobGriefing = false*.

### Showcase
The mobGriefing gamerule is set to false in this showcase.
![Showcase](https://i.imgur.com/MCeUZgk.gif)

You are allowed to use this mod in any modpack.
